name: kling-v2.1
description: Use Kling v2.1 to generate 5s and 10s videos in 720p and 1080p resolution from a starting image (image-to-video)

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds
duration.title: duration

end_image.description: Last frame of the video (pro mode is required when this parameter is set)
end_image.title: End Image

mode.description: Standard has a resolution of 720p, pro is 1080p. Both are 24fps.
mode.title: mode

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in the video
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

start_image.description: First frame of the video. You must use a start image with kling-v2.1.
start_image.title: Start Image
